overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene features dense urban architecture with massive holographic advertisements, elevated highways, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic on wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera pans down from skyscraper view to street level
character begins crossing the wide yellow-striped intersection

agents.ego_description: character with red hair and blue pants walks across the neon-lit intersection, navigating between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a metal bench near the crosswalk

entered.detail: towering building with massive pink holographic samurai display
multi-level concrete highway structure crossing above the street
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red X markings
multiple illuminated advertising screens on building facades
sleek cars with neon underglow and red taillights driving through intersection

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a dramatic upward view of a towering skyscraper displaying a massive pink holographic advertisement. The camera pans down to street level where the character crosses a wide intersection marked with bold yellow stripes. Neon signs illuminate the wet pavement as futuristic vehicles drive past, and a few pedestrians occupy the sidewalks near metal benches.

events.description: moves from open intersection to covered walkway under overpass
passes large vertical billboard displaying FEEL THE BEAT advertisement

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing under concrete overpasses

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying purple and pink advertisement with female figure
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection into a semi-covered walkway beneath the elevated highway. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting mixing with neon glow from distant signs. The character passes a prominent vertical billboard advertising FEEL THE BEAT while walking alongside a metal railing that separates the sidewalk from the busy street where moderate traffic flows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway with graffiti-covered construction wall

events.description: enters narrower corridor with yellow graffiti-covered wall on right side

agents.ego_description: character walks through the narrow passage next to a yellow construction wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on cardboard against the graffiti wall with scattered belongings

entered.detail: yellow construction barrier covered in colorful tags, stickers, and street art including KEEP OUT messages
discarded cardboard boxes and trash accumulated along the wall base

segments.scene_description: The environment narrows into a confined walkway flanked by a yellow graffiti-covered construction wall on the right and a metal railing on the left. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial, with neon reflections visible on the wet ground. The character passes a homeless person sitting against the wall amidst cardboard debris while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: exits narrow corridor back to open intersection with tall buildings
character crosses the street at crosswalk while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection

agents.ego_description: character crosses the wide intersection, moving toward the center of the neon-lit street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with glowing red taillights driving through the intersection

entered.detail: skyscrapers with illuminated windows and vertical neon accents lining the street
reflective wet road surface mirroring the colorful neon lights from signs and vehicles

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow corridor, the scene opens back into a wide neon-lit intersection surrounded by towering glass buildings. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside a moderate crowd of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles with glowing taillights navigate the streets. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon signage, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit metropolis, transitioning from an expansive urban intersection into a confined corridor before emerging back into a wide city square. It begins with a dramatic upward tilt toward a towering pink holographic advertisement before panning down to a wide, yellow-striped intersection where futuristic vehicles glide across wet pavement. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a darker, semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing a vertical billboard and a metal railing. The environment then narrows further into a confined passage flanked by graffiti-covered construction walls and cardboard debris, where the lighting becomes more artificial and oppressive. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor as the space opens back into a vibrant, wide intersection surrounded by glass skyscrapers and a crowd of pedestrians under the glow of reflecting neon signs.
